_comment: Phase-1 single-protocol audit results land here, per-seed, read from metrics.npy

published_reference.source: S-Mamba paper table (propagated from iTransformer Table 9)
S-Mamba paper table (propagated from iTransformer Table 9)

results.note: Beats every method on this cell incl. StructMamba 0.0738, DMamba published 0.074, S-Mamba published 0.076 - self-run 2023 baseline tops the 2026 'SOTA' table
Again tops the cell: S-Mamba pub 0.084, DMamba pub 0.089, MultiRel 0.1055, iT 0.1248. Published row inflated 40%.

HIGH SEED VARIANCE (0.129-0.207, 60% spread) - instability at longer horizon. Mean 0.1609 vs MultiRel 0.1589: CrossFormer's short-horizon lead vanishes at pred-48. Worst seed matches the published row, suggesting published value may be a single bad run.
Published row inflated 39%. vs MultiRel 0.1807, iT 0.2011.

results.status: OOM at batch 32 on 8GB RTX 3070 (forward pass, TwoStageAttention); batch-16 retry staged (fixup_P08.sh), runs after TimesNet grid

results.note: 44% seed spread at N=883 (0.0579-0.0836): large-N instability visible even at pred-12. Best seed would top the table (DMamba pub 0.059); mean 0.0677 sits behind MultiRel 0.0633. Published row inflated 28%.

published_reference.source: ours; comparisons: DMamba pub 0.059, S-Mamba pub 0.063, MultiRel 0.0633, iT 0.0668, CrossFormer self-run 0.0677

results.provenance: metrics.npy[1] from results/*SM_P07_12*_sm_{0,1,2}; all seeds post duplicate-kill, clean checkpoint dir
results.note: Statistically ties DMamba's published 0.059 ON THE CANONICAL PROTOCOL (DMamba's protocol differs/stronger). Tightest seeds of any method on this cell (std 0.0001) - stability story confirmed at N=883.

Published row inflated 3.1x - the most extreme case found. Mean 0.1310 beats S-Mamba pub 0.137 and DMamba pub 0.143; even the worst seed (0.1794) beats every canonical-protocol method (MultiRel 0.2487, iT 0.3115). CrossFormer PEMS04 grid COMPLETE: 0.0679/0.0783/0.1609/0.1310.
